HOW GPUs WORK Cover & Contents Contents Cheatsheet

A Zine-Flavored Field Guide

HOW
GPUs
WORK

From game pixels to LLM agents — how a chip built for explosions became the engine of artificial intelligence, explained like a patient senior engineer would over pizza.

Narrated by The Clear Mentor · example-first, gotchas included · researched July 2026

Contents

  1. Why GPUs Run the Modern World pixels → AI, the one big idea
  2. CPU vs GPU: Latency vs Throughput four chefs vs 2,000 line cooks
  3. Inside the Chip: SMs, Warps & SIMT 32 rowers, one heartbeat
  4. Programming the Beast: Kernels, Blocks & Grids your first CUDA code
  5. The Memory Mountain why math is free and bytes are not
  6. The Graphics Pipeline: Triangles to Pixels the day job that started it all
  7. Tensor Cores & the Precision Game matrix engines, FP8, FP4
  8. GPUs & LLMs: Feeding the Token Machine why chatbots are bandwidth-bound
  9. When One GPU Isn't Enough NVLink, clusters, AI factories
  10. Getting Your Hands on a GPU free GPUs + three starter projects
  11. The Cheatsheet everything on one spread
How To Read

Use → and ← to turn pages, ↑ to come back here. Chapters build on each other, but each opens with a refresher — skipping ahead to Chapter 8 (the LLM one) is allowed and encouraged. Dashed boxes are cartoon slots: copy the prompt into your image generator and drop the result right on the box.
